name: CallButton
description: A round icon-only control button. Owns its full chrome (circle, size, centring) — references tokens only. The icon is a bound field; the Ref overrides `action` and overrides `style.background`/`style.color` per use (the icon inherits the button colour via currentColor).
whenToUse: A circular call control (mute / unmute / hang-up) or any round icon action. Compose via a Ref, mapping `icon` to a host field holding the glyph name, plus an `action` and a `style` tone override.
